proof_boundary.allowed_use: Internal owner-review packet and hosted-test specification for excessive-agency and high-impact action controls.
proof_boundary.buyer_safe_positioning: A draft high-impact action policy and boundary-test matrix exist; hosted no-autonomous-action proof is still missing.

current_source_alignment.policy_implication: Keep LLM tools minimal, avoid open-ended tools, apply least privilege, execute in user context, require human approval for high-impact actions, and mediate authorization outside the model.

current_source_alignment.framework: NIST AI RMF Generative AI Profile
current_source_alignment.policy_implication: Make action risk part of govern, map, measure, and manage controls before public-sector AI trust claims.

current_source_alignment.framework: CISA Secure by Design and Secure by Demand
current_source_alignment.policy_implication: Convert action safety into purchaser-reviewable questions, owner decisions, transparent boundaries, and repeatable verification evidence.
Treat action-boundary tests as secure-development verification evidence for buyers and software consumers.

policy_principles: No model-selected irreversible action: LLM output may recommend, draft, or classify, but downstream systems must enforce authorization and approval.
High-impact actions require a named authority context: authenticated user, reviewer role, verified webhook signature, or owner-approved operator context.
Open-ended tools and model-selected destinations are prohibited for post-analysis fanout.
Payment and entitlement actions require test-policy approval before proof execution and signed webhooks before mutation.
Outreach artifacts are copy-only until owner approval; no app or script should send external messages as part of this evidence phase.
Service-role scripts are operator proof tools, not autonomous product runtime tools.

policy_surfaces.name: Analyze-engine service-role persistence
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Service-role writes are mapped and must remain server-mediated.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve whether analyze-engine service-role writes need a centralized action allowlist before hosted pilots.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Add owner-approved hosted proof and a centralized allowlist for post-synthesis writes/fanout before enterprise no-autonomous-action claims.

policy_surfaces.name: Analyze-engine adjacent function and ML fanout
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Post-analysis fanout is source-visible and should be allowlisted before public-sector AI claims.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve the allowed post-analysis fanout list and decide whether any fanout must require explicit user confirmation.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Add a centralized post-LLM action allowlist with per-action approval/authorization labels and hosted regression evidence.

policy_surfaces.name: Forecast publication
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Public forecast creation has static auth, ownership, and governance gates.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve hosted negative tests for unowned, rejected, unreviewed, and contested linked analyses.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run hosted smoke plus RLS tests for owned, unowned, rejected, unreviewed, and contested linked analyses.

policy_surfaces.name: Human review request
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Review-request transitions are statically owner/reviewer gated.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run hosted owner/reviewer/other-user request-review smoke with redacted evidence.

policy_surfaces.name: Human review approve/reject
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Approve/reject is human reviewer gated in source.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve hosted role-boundary tests before no-autonomous-review claims.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run hosted role-boundary tests for reviewer, owner, anonymous, and unrelated users.

policy_surfaces.name: Stripe checkout session creation
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Checkout initiation is user-authenticated and source-gated.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve Stripe test-key policy and hosted negative tests before payment-boundary claims.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run hosted payment test only with owner-approved test keys and redacted evidence.

policy_surfaces.name: Stripe webhook entitlement sync
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Stripe entitlement sync is signature-gated in source.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve invalid-signature and valid-test-event hosted proof under test credentials.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run invalid-signature and valid-test-event hosted proof under owner-approved Stripe test policy.

policy_surfaces.name: Whop webhook entitlement sync
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Whop entitlement sync is signature-gated in source.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve invalid-signature and valid-test-event hosted proof under test policy.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run invalid-signature and valid-test-event hosted proof under owner-approved Whop test policy.

policy_surfaces.name: Buyer discovery outreach copy
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Outreach artifacts are draft-only and require owner approval.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve or edit the target slate and copy before any external contact.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Owner approves or edits the target slate and message copy before any outreach.

policy_surfaces.name: Hosted service-role smoke scripts
policy_surfaces.allowed_claim: Hosted service-role scripts are operator proof tools, not product runtime tools.
policy_surfaces.owner_decision_needed: Approve hosted proof scope, smoke users, redaction path, and secret handling.
policy_surfaces.next_gate: Run only after owner approval, with redacted logs and no secrets persisted.

boundary_tests.risk: public forecast linked to another user analysis
boundary_tests.required_setup: two smoke users and one analysis_run owned by user A
boundary_tests.action: user B POSTs forecast-create with user A analysis_run_id
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 403 with code analysis_not_owned; no forecast row created

boundary_tests.risk: public forecast from rejected, unreviewed, or non-evidence-backed analysis
boundary_tests.required_setup: smoke user owns linked analysis with rejected/unreviewed governance state
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 400 with governance status; no forecast row created

boundary_tests.required_setup: analysis_run under_review and authenticated user without reviewer role
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 403 with reviewer role required; analysis status unchanged

boundary_tests.risk: reviewer changes status of analysis that is not pending review
boundary_tests.required_setup: reviewer user and analysis_run not under_review
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 400 Analysis is not pending review; analysis status unchanged

boundary_tests.risk: authenticated user initiates checkout for another email
boundary_tests.required_setup: authenticated smoke user and Stripe test key policy
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 403 Authenticated user email does not match checkout email; no Stripe session created

boundary_tests.required_setup: authenticated non-edu smoke user and Stripe test key policy
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 400 academic pricing requires .edu email; no Stripe session created

boundary_tests.required_setup: hosted webhook endpoint with configured test secret
boundary_tests.action: POST unsigned or badly signed Stripe event
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 401 Invalid Stripe signature; no payment_logs or subscription mutation

boundary_tests.risk: unsigned Whop webhook mutates membership or subscription
boundary_tests.required_setup: hosted webhook endpoint with configured Whop webhook secret
boundary_tests.action: POST unsigned or badly signed Whop event
boundary_tests.expected_result: HTTP 401 Invalid signature; no whop_users or subscription mutation

boundary_tests.risk: post-analysis fanout uses open-ended model-selected function or URL
boundary_tests.required_setup: source scan plus optional hosted request with fanout-triggering analysis
boundary_tests.action: verify fanout targets are fixed known functions and record whether model can alter destination
boundary_tests.expected_result: known allowlist only; no model-supplied arbitrary endpoint

boundary_tests.risk: service-role proof scripts become autonomous product actions
boundary_tests.required_setup: source scan of hosted proof scripts
boundary_tests.action: verify service-role scripts require explicit operator env and are not exposed as app runtime routes
boundary_tests.expected_result: operator-only scripts with owner-approved secret policy and no secret persistence in artifacts

boundary_tests.risk: generated copy is mistaken for authorized outreach execution
boundary_tests.required_setup: source scan of discovery kit generator
boundary_tests.action: verify artifact remains copy-only and requires owner approval before sending
boundary_tests.expected_result: no send action and visible owner-approval warning

boundary_tests.risk: LLM has direct path to irreversible high-impact action
boundary_tests.required_setup: AI action inventory generated from current source map
boundary_tests.expected_result: count is 0; any future nonzero count blocks public-sector AI claims

owner_approval_checklist: Approve or edit the high-impact action classification for every policy surface.
Approve whether analyze-engine service-role persistence and fanout require a centralized allowlist before hosted pilots.
Approve hosted negative tests for forecast publication and human review role boundaries.
Approve Stripe and Whop test-key/test-webhook policy before payment or entitlement proof.
Approve hosted URL, deployed release, smoke users, redacted evidence paths, and no-secret logging rules.
Mark this policy externally shareable only after hosted boundary tests, RLS tests, and privacy/support terms are attached.

decision.confidence_reason: The policy draft improves governance readiness, but no owner approval or hosted boundary test evidence exists.
decision.current_claim: draft high-impact action policy and boundary-test matrix ready for owner review
